base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of kraids_fake_kraid_fight — a character (boss) from 1986 metroid. Fake Kraid — red mini-boss encountered in Kraid's Lair prior to real Kraid. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Fake Kraid — red mini-boss encountered in Kraid's Lair prior to real Kraid; 2-frame attack-cycle
